name: Project Aegis Map Visual Art Pack v1
origin: All textures, decals, meshes, previews, and descriptors were procedurally generated as original Project Aegis assets for this pack.
runtimeFormatNote: .aegismap.json remains gameplay source of truth; these assets are visual mappings for generated map metadata.
